PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Holland for Petitioner.

Mr. Holland stated that his Client is the only heir, and that they could have gone intestate and had this over with. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for April 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
